div.b: Rajah Kelas Domain Teras Sistem PetaKerja

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1798px; height: 1px; padding-top: 64px; margin-left: 366px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #475467;

div.div: Model domain berdasarkan kod TypeScript dan jadual Supabase langsung. Operasi pada entiti mewakili tanggungjawab aplikasi yang mengurus rekod, bukan kaedah ORM atau kaedah literal pada entiti.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1798px; height: 1px; padding-top: 2778px; margin-left: 367px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #475467;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: "Arial"; color: light-dark(#475467, #c5cedb); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Legenda: <<entity>> = rekod Supabase; <<service>> = servis TypeScript; <<interface>> = kontrak TypeScript; JobListing menormalkan rekod public.scraped_jobs; garisan putus-putus = hubungan logik atau dependency; berlian kosong = aggregation.
